ai_summary: Bhageria Industries Limited has announced its 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held virtually on August 1, 2026, to consider a recommended dividend of Rs. 2.50 per equity share (50% of face value) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Shareholders as of July 24, 2026, will be eligible for this dividend, payable on or after August 6, 2026, upon AGM approval. This is a standard regulatory disclosure regarding corporate governance and profit distribution, with no apparent red flags.
